title: Chandler Blacker’s CV
text:
CHANDLER BLACKER Rexburg, ID | 214-854-5205 | chandlerblacker@gmail.com LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/chandler-blacker PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY Business Analytics student (GPA: 3.9) with experience analyzing operational data, developing dashboards, and supporting business decision-making using SQL, Excel, Python, and Power BI. Strong foundation in data cleaning, reporting, visualization, and relational databases with international leadership experience collaborating across diverse teams. Fluent in English, Spanish, and Guarani. EDUCATION Brigham Young University–Idaho | B.S. Business Analytics | Expected July 2027 | GPA: 3.9 Relevant Coursework: Business Intelligence, Database Management, Data Visualization, Business Forecasting, Statistical Analysis, Marketing Analytics TECHNICAL SKILLS Programming: SQL, Python (Pandas, NumPy), R Business Intelligence: Power BI, DAX, Power Query, Excel (PivotTables, Solver, VBA) Analytics: Data Cleaning, ETL Concepts, Exploratory Data Analysis, KPI Development, Dashboard Design, Forecasting Professional: Business Analysis, Stakeholder Communication, Process Improvement, Technical Documentation ANALYTICS PROJECTS Retail Profitability Intelligence Dashboard | Power BI • Imported, cleaned, and transformed retail sales data using Power Query. • Designed a relational data model connecting Orders, Returns, and People tables. • Developed DAX measures for Total Sales, Total Profit, Profit Margin, and Order Count. • Built interactive dashboards analyzing regional performance, sales trends, and profitability. Financial Forecasting & Budget Analysis | Excel • Built a forecasting model using historical financial data. • Created dashboards comparing projected and actual performance to support budgeting decisions. • Applied historical trend analysis to identify spending patterns. Customer Segmentation Analysis | SQL • Wrote SQL queries using joins, aggregations, and filtering to identify customer segments and purchasing trends. PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE Technology Specialist & Data Coordinator | Global Non-Profit Organization | Paraguay | 2024–2025 • Collected, cleaned, and maintained operational data supporting regional reporting and planning. • Built recurring reports used by leadership to monitor operational performance and organizational metrics. • Identified process improvement opportunities through data analysis and operational reviews. • Improved recurring spreadsheet reporting processes to increase reporting consistency. • Collaborated with cross-functional teams while supporting technology operations in English and Spanish. Spreadsheet Analysis Teaching Assistant | Brigham Young University–Idaho • Assisted students with Excel, dashboard development, forecasting, PivotTables, Solver, and advanced spreadsheet analysis. Team Associate | In-N-Out Burger • Worked in a fast-paced environment, trained new employees, and maintained quality and customer service standards.

title: Isaac Newtons’s CV
text:
Standing on the shoulders of giants


Laws of motion, gravitation, minting coins, disliking Robert Hooke



Cooling, power series, optics, alchemy, planetary motions, apples.

title: Isaac Newtons’s CV
text:
1654-1660 The King’s School, Grantham.
June 1661 - now Trinity College, Cambridge

Sizar

1667 - death Trinity College, Cambridge

Fellow

title: Isaac Newtons’s CV
text:

Associate, French Academy of Science, Paris, France

1669 Lectiones opticæ.
etc. etc. etc.



2012 Infinitesimal calculus for solutions to physics problems, SMBC patent 001
